content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally across multiple sectors (Capital Goods, IT, FMCG, Specialty Chem, Financials) with most held positions showing meaningful gains from entry. However, the cumulative -53.72% drawdown demands defensive posture: lock in gains via SL trailing rather than chase new entries late in the session. Several held names (ADANIPORTS at ATH after promoter sell-down, HAL after +31% rally, NAVINFLUOR at upper Bollinger) are technically extended.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 0,
      "nifty_resistance": 0
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.0,
      "new_target": 1110.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70, entry 984, +7.4% unrealized. Stored SL 1035 is below entry but already locks +5.2%. Tightening to 1040 (still 1.6% below CMP, respects 1% trail-gap rule). Q4 strong, MOFSL Buy. Hold for 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12, entry 125.10, -0.8%. Defensive position. SL 121 is ~2.5% below CMP — appropriate. MACD bearish crossover noted but minor. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.0,
      "new_target": 1820.0,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10, entry 1700, +3.4%. At ATH. Promoter sold ~2% stake at Rs 1,632 on May 5 — classic distribution signal. Keep SL at 1735 (locks +2%, 1.25% below CMP, respects trail-gap rule). Note: Loosening would be rejected — keeping at 1735 which equals stored. Actually, this is no-op; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40, entry 4575, +1.2%. SL 4530 is 2.2% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Defense thesis intact, new CMD catalyst, +31% sector rally. Hold for 4875 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.0,
      "new_target": 7400.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049, entry 6900, +2.2%. SL 6960 already at near-breakeven, 1.3% below CMP. This matches stored — converting to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.0,
      "new_target": 900.0,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20, entry 838, +0.86%. Stock above 9.84% today. Tighten SL from 828 to 836 (0.998% above current SL — locks small loss minimum, 1.1% below CMP, respects trail-gap). Q4 results pending May — binary tail risk; keep tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.0,
      "new_target": 388.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70, entry 369, ~breakeven. SL 365 already 1% below CMP. No-op vs stored — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.0,
      "new_target": 860.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55, entry 820, +0.3%. SL 815 is 0.9% below CMP. No-op vs stored — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.0,
      "new_target": 1330.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10, entry 1259, +1.6%. SL 1260 at near-breakeven, 1.5% below CMP. No-op — HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.0,
      "new_target": 3225.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034, entry 3025, +0.3%. SL 3000 is 1.1% below CMP. No-op — HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.0,
      "new_target": 855.0,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30, entry 806, ~breakeven. SL 798 is 1.1% below CMP. No-op — HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.0,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1035 to 1040 to lock more of the +7.4% gain while preserving 1.6% breathing room from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL adequate, no change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At ATH, promoter sold 2% — watching but SL 1735 already locks gain. Will exit on any close below SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong defense momentum, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 already locks breakeven+. Adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.0,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL given Q4 results due in May (binary tail risk) and stock up sharply on volume — protect downside on event-day reversal risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 365 adequate, near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 815 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1260 at breakeven, +1.6% on day. Adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3000 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 798 adequate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OMC names (HINDPETRO, BPCL) — bearish research (Goldman/Emkay downgrades, FY27 EBITDA -40-60%) overrides today's bounce; AVOID despite tape strength. NEULANDLAB — board meeting May 12 (binary in 3 sessions), avoid new entry per binary-event rule. CAMS, MARICO already held. COFORGE, GRSE already held. New entries deferred — book is already 80%+ deployed in equivalent themes (defense, capital goods, financials, FMCG, IT, chemicals). HFCL pending BUY — 2007 mins old, stale; should be reviewed but not part of provided position list. Cancelling stale HFCL order is appropriate.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-deployed across 11 CNC names with broad sector spread. Cumulative -53.72% PnL is the dominant context — focus is capital preservation and trailing winners, not adding new directional risk in the last 75 minutes of the session. Multiple positions are at or near breakeven SLs which is the right outcome of disciplined entries; let them work toward targets without micro-adjusting. Skipping all new entries today.",
  "decisions_addendum": "Note: Several MODIFY entries above are flagged as no-op vs stored SL/target. Per instructions, these should be HOLD. The intended actionable MODIFYs are PNBHOUSING (1035→1040) and TITAGARH (828→836). All others HOLD."
}
